pericopes.title: Jerusalem khopi chonset chule akilhat damna

chapters.text: Judah lengpa Amon chapa Josi’ah nikho laiya Hezeki’ah chapa Amari’ah, Amari’ah chapa Gedali’ah, Gedali’ah chapa Cushi, Cushi chapa Zephaini’ah kitipa henga Pakaiyin thu ahinsei chu,
“Leiset chunga thil ijakai Katheh ngimhel ding ahi,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Keiman mihem le gancha katheh ngim ding, Chunga leng vahchate jong katheh ngim ding, Twikhanglen a nga jouse jong Katheh ngimsoh hel ding ahi. Migilou jouse akhup athal’a kalea, Leiset chunga mihem kasuhgam ding ahi,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

“Judah gam douna kakhut kalap ding, Jerusalem khopia chengte dou na kakhut kalap ding ahi; Jerusalem a kona ba’al doihouho Amoh chengse jong kasuhgam ding, Milimdoi houva pang Thempuho min jouse kasuh mang ding ahi;
Inchung dunga bohkhup’uva Van loupina chengse houho jong, Boh khup’uva Pakai henga kihahsel sel’uva, Chuma leh Milcom doi phunga jong kihahsel ho kasuh mang ding ahi;
Pakai nunga ache nauva kona nungjam kit’ a Pakai jong hol lou dong jong donglou hochu Kasuh mang ding ahi,” ati.
Pakai Pathen angsunga thip beh chan umin, Ajeh chu Pakai nikho ahung naitai; Pakaiyin kilhaina gantha ding khat agongin, Ajin lhung ho jong athenso soh tai.
Pakaiyin kilhaina gantha abol nikhoa “Keiman vaibol’a pang ho le lengpa chapate talen kapeh a, Koi koi hiujongleh gamchom mite vona kivon tapou chu Talen kapeh ding ahi.
Hiche nikho teng chuleh Changphol’a kichom jangkhai jouse talen kapeh ding, Apu pau insung dimset’a kikhoma Pumhat le joulhep’a thilbol ho chu talen kapeh ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Hiche nikho chuleh Nga kelkot’a kona ogin khat kija ding, Mi chenna in ni lhinnaa kona jong Mi ka-gin khat kija ding ahi, thinglhang dunga kona opoh vel vul’a ogin kija ding ahi.
Vo thi thei mihema cheng ho kap’uvin; Ajeh chu kivei miho abeisoh tauvin, Dangka tetoh lea pang jouse jong Akisu mangsoh hel tauve.
Hiche phat teng hileh Mei kadeh konga Jerusalem kahol le ding, Mi nen cheh cheh a um’uva alungthim uva jong ‘Pakaiyin thilpha jong thilse jong Boldeh ponte,’ tia Seiji ho chu talen kapeh ding ahi.

Athilkeo jouseu kichomdoh soh keiya, A in jouseu jong ahomkeova kijamsoh ding; kisah jongu leh Chenna anei louhel diu ahi; Lengpilei tampi kibol’u jongleh Hichenga kona hi lengpitwi adonlou diu ahi,” ati.

Pakai nikho loupitah chu ahung naiye, Anai lheh jengin ahung lhung vah ding ahitai; Pakai nikho ding husa gin chu thoh theilou khaveng vung ahin, Mi thahat tah jong chu kapjah jenga peng jeng ding ahibouve.

Hiche nikho chu lungsat nikho ahin, Genthei nikho le hesoh nikho ahi; Manthah nikho leh ahomkeova kitun nikho ahin, Munthim nikho leh lungjin nikho ahi; Meibol nikho leh Muthim lhangkhal kiheh nikho ahi.
Sumkon kimut nikho leh gal kisap nikho ahin, Kulpi tampi kidelkhum nikho leh Galmun nasa tah tah a Gal kisap nikho hiding ahi.

Keiman mihemte hi genthei hesoh a kabol ding, Chutengleh mitcho banga vahle diu ahi; Ajeh chu Pakai dou nan achonseuvin, Athisan u vut boh a kibo ding, Atahsa jengu jong chu Eh paiya kipaidoh ding ahi.

Adangka uva jong asana uva jong Hiche Pakai lungsat nikhoa kilhat theilou diu ahi. Tom ngai tah a alungsatna a hi Leiset jeng jong kibahgam diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin leiset pumpia Achengte jouse asuh beihel’a kichaihel’a alha ding ahi.
Vo jum le ja helou nam mite. Hung kikhom’uvin lang khoppi len bol’uvin;
Changsi kisep mang banga Min nasep mang masang u, Pakai lunghan kichat umtah chu Nachunguva ahung lhun masang, Pakai lungsat nikho kiti chu Nachunguva ahung lhun masangin.

Gamsunga milung nengten Nabon chauvin Pakai jeng hol’uvin, Athupeh jouse dungjuiya Chon jing theiya natong jing hon; Adih jeng hol’uvin lang, Nun nemna jeng hol’uvin; Chutileh Pakai lungsat nikhoa chu Naseldoh thei maiyu jong ahiye.
Ajeh chu Gaza khopi jong min dalhan tin, Ash’kelon khopi jong akeova kijam ding ahi; Sun chang laiya Ashdoh kho mite kidel jam diu, Ekron khopi jong abul abal’a kikaldoh ding ahi.

Vo Twikhanglen pang dunga chengte ada nahiuve! Cher’eth mia kisim nam mite! Pakaiyin nangho dou nan thu aseiyin, Vo Canaan, Philistine mite gam; Nagam sunga cheng ding abeihel kahsea Keiman namite kasuh mang mang ding ahi.
Vo Twikhanglen pang dung, nang hi gancha neh thei hamhing gam nahiya, Kelngoi chingte dinga hamhing nahia, kelngoi honte honga napan ding ahiye.

Twikhanglen pang dung gam hi Judah insung mi amoh cheng ahingdoh hon chenna anei diu. Hiche gamsunga hi gancha avah uva, Nilhah dung teng jongleh Ash’kelon in dunga lum diu ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai a-Pathen uvin agelkhoh diu, Asemphat’a ahamphat sah ding ahi.
“Keiman Moab gam kiletsahna kajan, Ammon miten mi ahouset nau kajai; Itobang tah a kamite kiletsah a adou’-uva, Agamsung douna kiletsah hoithona aneiyu hitam!

Hichejeh hin “Keima kahing jinge,” tin, Pakai thaneipen Israel Pathen in aseiyin, “Moab khopi jong Sodom khopi hung bang ding, Ammon mite jong hi Gomorrah tobang a Hung umdoh diu ahi. Ling le khao dimsetna gam chikhuh jeng umna hiya Aitih chan geiya ahomkeova kijam ding ahi. Kamite ahingdoh amoh chengsen akichom’uva, Kajat mite ahing chengin achenpha diu ahi,” ati.
Akiletsah gau chu hitobang hi hiding ahi. Ajeh chu amahon mi atot thanguvin, Thaneipen Pakai mite dounan Kiletsahna anabol bol jengui.
Amaho dinga Pakai chu tijat umtah hiding, Leiset chunga pathen lim kisemthu jouse asuhmang ding; Pakai angsunga chu namtin vaipi jouse Ama ama gamsung cheh a boh khup diu ahi.
Vo Ethiopia mite, nangho jong hi Chemjama nalousoh kei diu ahi.
Pakaiyin sahlam douna akhut alhan ding, Assyria gam jong asuh mang ding ahi; Nin’eveh khopi jong akeova alup sah a, Nelgam banga gamgoa akoi ding ahi.

Akhopi lailunga bongte kol’uva, Gamlah a gamsa jouse jong hung kol diu; Khopi intingvum dunga jong Muthongte hung geh uvin tin, Kholai dunga jong saphute hung cheng diu ahi; Bangkot dunga jong simbupi hung hamin te; Hongcha dunga jong va-ah hung ham ding ahi. Ajeh chu cedar thinga kisa in jouse akeova kijam ding ahi.

Hiche khopi chu kichoi sanglea Lung mong tah a khosa ahin, Ama le ama kihouva, “Keibou kahin koima dang a um poi,” tia seiyah ahi. Tua hi itia hitobanga ahomkeova kijam hita, Gamsate chenna hung sohdoh hitam! Ajotpa ahopa jousen Aphiset khum’uvin akhut tum achup khum khum’uve.
Ohe ada ahi, doumah bol’a pang Kisuboh soh hel’a mi bolgentheiya pang khopi!
Hiche khopi hin koima thusei ging ajapon, Min adih lam ahil angaipoi. Pakaiya aki-ngaideh pon, A-Pathen lam jong anaideh poi.
Akhopi sunga vaibol’a pang ho jong Sakei bahkai kitumlet lut tobang ahiuvin; Athutan vaihoma pang ho jong Nilhah tengleh vahle le kamkeite, jingkah gei dia ima khenlou tobang ahiuve.
Athemgaoho jong pannabei ahiuvin, Mi kitahlou jeng ahiuve; Athempua pang hon jong atheng chu asuboh-uvin, Danthu jeng jong apalkeh uvin ahi.

Akhopi sunga Pakai chu adih jing nan, Thildih lou imacha abol khapoi. Jingkah seh leh thu adih a atan chu mi avetsah jin, Khovah seh leh kipel khalouvin abol jinge; Amavang adih louva chonpa vangin Jum lam ja lam ahepoi.

“Keiman namtin vaipi kasumangin, Akisat nau galmun jouse amangthah soh tai; Akholai dung jouseu jong ahomkeovin kajamin, Hijeh chun koimacha avahle khapoi; Akhopi jouseu jong acheng beiyin akikoiyin, Mihem bei acheng beiyin aumtai.

Kenjong kaseiyin, ‘Akhopi hin eiging tante, kahilna sanginte, Achunga kalhunsah thilsoh hijatpi hi Mupha louvin kho mulou bangin umponte’ katin; Ahivanginla akhoh cheh cheh-in Atoh abol jouseu hi Aselam jengin abol bol jengin ahi,” kati.

Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Hijeh chun kho ngaiyin nei ngah-in, Keima hettohsah a kapan ni geiyin nei ngah tan. Ajeh chu keima dinna hi namtin vaipi khopsoh a Lenggam jouse khop tup ding, Kalunghanna save vupi chu aboncha Achunguva sun lhah a kalung phatmona phondoh ding kati ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh kalungsatna meikong tobang hin Leiset pumpi ahalvam jeng ding ahi.
“Tah beh mongin, hicheteng chuleh Mitin vaipi thusei chu thu mai maiya kakhelpeh ding; Chutah le mitin abonchauva Pakai mina tao cheh diu, Lung khat tah a Pakai ajenle diu ahi.
Ethiopia vadung jouse gal lama kona kahenga taoji, A vah chehho kamite chanun jong keidia thilto ahinchoi ding ahi.

“Hiche nikho chuleh nakijumso lou ding ahi: nangman keima douna thil nabol hojeh a chu; ijeh-inem itileh nalailunga kona, Ama le ama kichoisangho kapaidoh ding ahitan, Keima lhang theng chunga chu, Nangma nakiletsah hoi tho kit lou ding ahitai.
Ajeh chu nakholai lunga, Mi kinemsah lung neng tah jat khat kakoi ding, Ama ho hin Pakai min a kiselna ahinhol diu ahi.

Kiselna hol ding ho chu Israel lah a kidalha ho ahiuve; Thildih lou jong abol kit lou diu ahitan, Thujou jeng jong asei dauva Akamsung uva aleiguiyu jong jou le nal seiya kileh lou hel ding ahitai. Ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi kelngoi banga Nomsel’a hamhing lah a lhale banga lhauva kol diu; Koimacha chan jong Ahoh kichat kit lou diu ahitai,” ati.
Vo Zion chanu, othongin la san, Vo Israel, kho-lhang samin; Vo Jerusalem chanu, Nalungthim pumpin kipah-in kichoi sangin!
Nangma douna thu kitan ding chu Pakaiyin alamang tan, Namelmate jouse jong apaidoh soh tai; Nalailunga chun Israel lengpa Pakai chu acheng jinge; Nangman thilse chu Nagin kit louhel ding ahitai.
Hiche nikho chuleh Jerusalem khopi jah a kiseiya; “Vo Zion, kicha hih-in, Nakhut teni thahat jong lhahsam sahhih-in,
Pakai na-Pathen chu nalailunga apansan, Gal-hat tah ahin gal najosah ji ahiye; Nachunga thanom tah a kipah ding ahin, Nalungset’a nathahsem ding ahi; Othongje jua la asah a Nachoisang ding ahi,
Kutpi nikho jongleh hitobanga chu nabol ding ahi. “Nakoma kona manthahna katol mangding, Hijeh a chu min naphona Najah khah louhel ding ahi.

Neihin vetan, hitobang phat teng hileh Nabol genthei jouse kabol gima, Elbai jouse jong kahuhhing soh keiya, Mi deilou ho jouse kakhop khom ding ahi. Amaho hi ajachatna jouse jong Vahchoina jenga kakheldoh peh ding, Leiset pumpi chunga hi Minthanga kakoi ding ahiuve.

Chutengleh keiman nangho hi inlama kahin puilut diu, Hiche phat hileh nangho kakhop khom ding nahiuve; Leiset’a mitin vaipi jouse lah a hi Minthang tah a kakoiyuva vahchoiya kaumsah diu ahi; Namitmu tah uva kasemphat’uva Hamphatna kapeh tenguleh,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye.
